column1: - **Audit:** CloudTrail logs all SageMaker API calls
- Set **max wait time** and **max run time**
- Best for: Training jobs (not real-time endpoints)
- Deploy multiple model versions on one endpoint
- Split traffic by percentage (e.g., 90% model A, 10% model B)
- Instant rollback by changing traffic weights
- Predictions are logged but NOT served to users
- Compare new model predictions vs. current model
- Zero risk to users during validation

column1: - **""Large dataset, no real-time need""** -> Batch Transform
- **""Many similar models, save cost""** -> Multi-Model Endpoint
- **""Input data changed""** -> Data Quality Monitor (drift detection)
- **""Bias changed over time""** -> Bias Drift Monitor
- **""When to retrain""** -> Data drift detected OR accuracy degradation
- **""Approval before deploy""** -> Model Registry approval workflow
- **""Encrypt training data""** -> KMS (at rest) + TLS (in transit)
- **""Control who can deploy""** -> IAM roles and policies
- **""Reduce training cost""** -> Managed Spot Training (up to 90% savings)
- **""Reduce inference cost""** -> Serverless, Multi-Model, Auto Scaling
- **""Steady inference traffic""** -> Savings Plans or Reserved
- **""Deploy to IoT devices""** -> Edge Manager + Neo compilation
- **""No internet on device""** -> Greengrass ML (local inference)
- **Real-time endpoint** for low-latency. **Batch Transform** for large offline jobs.
- **Serverless inference** for unpredictable/infrequent traffic (cold starts possible).
- **Multi-Model Endpoint** saves cost when you have many models with similar resource needs.
- **Production Variants** enable A/B testing by splitting traffic percentages.
- **Shadow testing** validates new models with zero user risk.
- **Model Monitor** detects 4 types of drift: data quality, model quality, bias, feature attribution.
- **Managed Spot Training** saves up to 90% - always enable checkpointing.
- **SageMaker Pipelines** is the MLOps orchestrator (not Step Functions for ML).
- **Model Registry** provides versioning + approval workflow for models.
- **Neo** compiles models for target hardware (up to 2x faster inference).
- **Inference Pipeline** chains up to 15 containers (preprocess + predict + postprocess).
- **VPC + Network Isolation** for maximum security (no internet access).
- **Debugger** catches training issues (vanishing gradients, overfitting) automatically.
- **BYOC** containers must implement /ping and /invocations for inference.
- **Checkpointing** is critical for Spot Training (resume after interruption).
- **/opt/ml/** is the standard directory structure for SageMaker containers.

column2: +-- Real-time: Always-on endpoint, low latency, auto scaling
+-- Serverless: Pay per request, cold starts, infrequent traffic
+-- Batch Transform: Large datasets, offline, no endpoint
+-- Async: Large payloads, queue-based, auto scaling to zero
+-- Multi-Model: Many models, shared infrastructure, cost savings
+-- Strategies: All-at-once, Canary, Linear, Blue/Green, Shadow
+-- Elastic Inference: Fractional GPU for inference
+-- Data Quality: Feature drift, schema violations
+-- Model Quality: Accuracy degradation, prediction drift
+-- Bias Drift: Fairness metrics over time
+-- Pipelines: Orchestrate ML workflow (process, train, evaluate, deploy)
+-- Model Registry: Version, approve, deploy models
+-- Encryption: KMS (at rest), TLS (in transit), inter-container
+-- Network: VPC, endpoints, security groups, network isolation
+-- IAM: Execution roles, user roles, pipeline roles
+-- Compliance: HIPAA, SOC, PCI DSS, FedRAMP
+-- Training: Managed Spot (90% savings), checkpointing, right-sizing
+-- Inference: Serverless, Multi-Model, Auto Scaling, Neo
+-- Storage: Pipe Mode (no download), lifecycle policies
+-- Plans: Savings Plans for steady workloads
+-- Edge Manager: Deploy, monitor, manage edge models
+-- Neo: Compile for target hardware (ARM, GPU, x86)
+-- Data Capture: Edge data back to cloud for retraining

column1: +-- Script Mode: Custom code + built-in container
